description:
OL 316 (REV. 2/2017)  WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Cruise autonomous vehicle (“Cruise AV”), operating in autonomous mode, was stopped at a 4-way stop on southbound 30th Avenue at 
the intersection with California Street when another vehicle made contact with the Cruise AV’s rear bumper, damaging the rear fascia and 
rear center radar assembly of the Cruise AV. There were no injuries and police were not called.
Go to Page 3
